description_for_human: Convert any URL, file, or entire website into clean, structured Markdown. Powered by headless Chrome, OCR, and Vision AI.
description_for_model: html2md converts URLs to Markdown using headless Chrome with stealth plugins. It supports single URL conversion, batch processing, deep site crawling, and file-to-Markdown extraction via OCR/Vision models. Use POST /api/convert for single URLs, POST /api/batch for multiple URLs, POST /api/crawl for site crawling, POST /api/file2md for file uploads, and POST /api/agentify to generate AI skill bundles from documentation sites. All endpoints stream real-time logs and return JSON after a __JSON__ delimiter.
